description:
Create three sequential 'Observation' logs in farmOS Field Kit to document weekly corn growth monitoring.

Log 1:
- Date: May 19, 2025
- Notes: 'Week 1: Corn at V3 stage (3 leaves with visible collars). Stand count averaged 32,000 plants per acre. Uniform emergence across demonstration plot. No signs of pest damage or nutrient deficiency.'
- Quantity: 12 inches (Label: 'plant height')

Log 2:
- Date: May 26, 2025
- Notes: 'Week 2: Corn at V6 stage. Growing point now above soil surface. Rapid growth observed. Minor flea beetle feeding on lower leaves, below economic threshold. Applied side-dress nitrogen recommendation discussed in class.'
- Quantity: 24 inches (Label: 'plant height')

Log 3:
- Date: June 2, 2025
- Notes: 'Week 3: Corn at V9 stage. Tassel initiation beginning. Internode elongation clearly visible. Root lodging risk assessment performed after recent storms. All plants upright, root development appears strong.'
- Quantity: 38 inches (Label: 'plant height')
